author: Wanja Zemke
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Not anOther Pdf Exporter. Export notes to publication-ready PDFs via Pandoc and the Eisvogel LaTeX template. Custom branding, glossaries, transclusions, and cross-references — Docker-powered toolchain, no LaTeX install required.
